featuresTitle: Why Thousands Use SmallPDF.us for Excel to PDF
featuresSubtitle: We handle the hard parts — multi-sheet workbooks, embedded charts, merged cells, and conditional formatting — so your PDF looks exactly like your spreadsheet.
feature1Desc: Font styles, cell colors, borders, merged cells, and number formats all transfer cleanly. What you see in Excel is exactly what you get in the PDF.
feature2Desc: Every worksheet tab in your workbook gets included. No manual sheet-by-sheet exporting — just one upload, one complete PDF.
feature3Desc: Bar charts, pie charts, line graphs, and data tables are all rendered and embedded in your PDF exactly as they appear in the original file.
feature4Desc: Your spreadsheet data never leaves our secure servers and is permanently deleted right after conversion. We never read or store your content.
feature5Desc: Most Excel files convert in under 5 seconds. Large files with many sheets may take a little longer, but we always aim for speed without sacrificing quality.
feature6Desc: Works in your browser — Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge. No plugins, no extensions, no login. Just upload and download.
stepsTitle: How to Convert Excel to PDF — 3 Easy Steps
stepsSubtitle: From spreadsheet to PDF in under a minute. Here's what happens when you upload.
step1Desc: Select your XLSX or XLS file from your device or drag it onto the upload area. Files up to 50 MB are supported.
step2Desc: Our converter reads every worksheet, renders charts and formatting, and builds a complete PDF document that matches your original layout.
step3Desc: Your PDF is ready within seconds. Download it to your device — it'll open perfectly in any PDF reader, browser, or printer.
faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about converting Excel files to PDF.
faq1Question: Is this Excel to PDF converter completely free?
faq1Answer: Yes — 100% free, no strings attached. You don't need to create an account, subscribe, or pay anything. Just upload your file and download the PDF.
faq2Question: Will my Excel formatting be preserved in the PDF?
faq2Answer: Absolutely. Our converter is built specifically to retain Excel formatting: cell colors, font sizes, borders, number formats, merged cells, and column widths all come through accurately.
faq3Question: Does it support multi-sheet Excel workbooks?
faq3Answer: Yes. All worksheets in your workbook are included in the PDF output. Each sheet becomes a section of the PDF, in the same order as your original workbook.
faq4Question: Are charts and graphs included in the PDF?
faq4Answer: Yes. Embedded charts, bar graphs, pie charts, scatter plots, and other visualizations are all rendered into the PDF. They appear exactly as they do in Excel.
faq5Question: Is it safe to upload sensitive spreadsheet data?
faq5Answer: Yes. All uploads use HTTPS encryption. Your file is processed in a secure environment and permanently deleted from our servers after conversion — we never access or store your data.
faq6Question: What's the maximum file size I can convert?
faq6Answer: The maximum file size is 50 MB, which covers most Excel workbooks. If your file is larger, try removing unused sheets, compressing images, or splitting it into smaller files.
seoSection1Title: The Best Way to Convert Excel Spreadsheets to PDF Online
seoSection1Para1: Whether you're sharing a financial report, sending a data table to a client, or archiving a quarterly summary, converting your Excel file to PDF is the most reliable way to ensure it looks right for everyone. PDFs are universally readable, uneditable, and print perfectly — unlike XLSX files, which depend on the viewer having Excel installed.
seoSection1Para2: SmallPDF.us makes this conversion fast and free. There's no software to install, no file size tricks, and no watermarks slapped on your document. What you upload is what you get back — just in PDF format.
seoSection2Para: One of the trickiest parts of Excel-to-PDF conversion is handling workbooks with multiple sheets and embedded charts. Many basic converters strip charts or only export the active sheet. Our engine processes every tab in your workbook and renders charts, conditional formatting, and pivot tables faithfully into the final PDF.
seoSection3Para: SmallPDF.us doesn't require an account, and we don't show ads inside your PDF or watermark your output. Your file is converted privately, and then deleted. It's the kind of tool you'll want to bookmark — for quick, clean Excel-to-PDF conversion anytime you need it.
